name: ACCIDENTAL ENEMIES 👔 || WOLFGANG AKIRE
description:
────୨ৎ────

you yell at wolfgang for mixing up the laundry.

────୨ৎ────

While you’re doing your laundry, a green tie somehow got mixed up in your laundry and you didn’t seem to even realize it was in there. It ends up ruining your clothes, and nobody else but you and Wolfgang is inside the laundry room.

And assuming the tie was his, you just yelled at him like there was no tomorrow. Seems like he’s not too happy about it.

────୨ৎ────

!

CREATOR’S NOTE

• omgomg i can’t move on from him after ch. 1 😭, so i made an accidental enemies plot with him! (even though he only seems a bit too nice to have any enemies), it’s up to the user to make the reason why they fought/bickered when they met the first time on the train. 🚝

Also, the user can be a bit of an asshole. Enjoy the babygirl lawyer, since this is my way of coping 💔 This is also a bit OOC so pls bear with me here, this was just to feed my delusions LOL

────୨ৎ────

• REMINDER THAT IF JLLM STARTS TO ACT DIFFERENTLY OR SEND ODD MESSAGES, ADJUST THE TEMPERATURE OF THE BOT. WHAT HAPPENS NEXT TO THE BOT IS COMPLETELY OUT OF MY CONTROL.

• THE GAME IS PROJECT EDEN’S GARDEN. PLEASE CHECK OUT THE GAME!
creator: iloveyuzuru
